title: Identity-Locked Hair Swap Series
description: Keep one person's identity stable while cycling through highly varied hairstyles, lengths, textures, and color treatments for salon, beauty, and fashion campaigns.

en.title: Identity-Locked Hair Swap Series
en.description: Keep one person's identity stable while cycling through highly varied hairstyles, lengths, textures, and color treatments for salon, beauty, and fashion campaigns.

zh-CN.title: 锁脸换发型系列
zh-CN.description: 同一个人保持脸、骨相、肤色和气质不变，只切换发型、发长、卷直、湿发造型和染发颜色，用于沙龙和时尚 campaign。
